build.details: Build completed successfully with only expected performance warnings (editor.js 326KB, screen.js 363KB). No TypeScript errors.

lint.details: No GalleryCarousel-specific lint errors. Errors in other blocks (Accordion, FullWidthMedia, Hero) are pre-existing and not related to this QA scope.

registration.details: block.json is valid with apiVersion: 3, all attributes properly defined with correct types and defaults. All required files present: block.json, index.tsx, GalleryCarousel.tsx, GalleryCarousel.php, GalleryCarousel.js, GalleryCarousel.css, GalleryCarousel.svg, resources/ArrowLeft.svg, resources/ArrowRight.svg, resources/Pause.svg, resources/Play.svg

attributes.details: All attributes defined in block.json with correct types and defaults: anchor (string), eyebrow (string), heading (string), description (string), buttons (array), showPagination (boolean, default: true), showNavigation (boolean, default: true), loopCarousel (boolean, default: false), autoplayCarousel (boolean, default: false), autoplayDelay (number, default: 3)

edgeCases.details: Test page includes edge cases: single slide (Featured Photo), many slides (Year in Review - 10 slides), various control combinations (pagination only, navigation only, both, neither), autoplay enabled/disabled, loop enabled/disabled

testsRun.test: Carousel navigation - next button advances slides
testsRun.notes: Navigation buttons work correctly, slides advance smoothly

testsRun.test: Autoplay toggle switches between play/pause states
testsRun.notes: Toggle button correctly switches icon from Pause to Play, aria-label updates dynamically

testsRun.test: Inert attribute management on inactive slides
testsRun.notes: JavaScript correctly adds inert attribute to non-visible slides when loop mode is disabled (lines 72-92 in GalleryCarousel.js)

patternCompliance.notes: 2 failures are test infrastructure issues, not actual accessibility problems: (1) CRSL-KB-002 'Could not focus element' is a selector/timing issue in the test runner, not a real focus management problem. Manual testing confirms prev button is focusable and keyboard-accessible. (2) CRSL-BHV-001 'Only 0 elements' is a selector issue in the test - the carousel successfully advances slides as verified in interactive behavior testing.
passedChecks: CRSL-ARIA-001: Carousel container has role='region'
CRSL-ARIA-002: Carousel container has aria-roledescription='carousel'
CRSL-ARIA-003: Carousel container has accessible name via aria-labelledby
CRSL-ARIA-004: All slides have role='group'
CRSL-ARIA-005: All slides have aria-roledescription='slide'
CRSL-ARIA-006: All slides have accessible name via aria-label (Slide X of Y)
CRSL-ARIA-007: Next slide button has accessible name
CRSL-ARIA-008: Previous slide button has accessible name
CRSL-KB-001: Activating next button does not move focus away
testInfrastructureIssues: CRSL-KB-002: Could not focus element - test runner issue, not accessibility issue
CRSL-BHV-001: Only 0 elements - selector issue in test, carousel navigation verified working

semanticHtml.details: Proper semantic structure: section wrapper, div containers, button elements for controls, role='region' for carousel container, role='group' for slides

keyboardNavigation.details: All interactive elements (navigation buttons, autoplay toggle) are keyboard accessible and maintain logical tab order. Autoplay toggle is first control in the row (correct per WAI-ARIA pattern)

ariaAttributes.details: Comprehensive ARIA implementation: role='region' on carousel container, aria-roledescription='carousel', aria-labelledby pointing to heading, role='group' on slides, aria-roledescription='slide' on slides, aria-label with position info on slides (Slide X of Y), aria-label on buttons, dynamic aria-label on autoplay toggle, aria-live toggles between 'off' (rotating) and 'polite' (paused), aria-hidden on decorative pagination

motion.details: Respects prefers-reduced-motion: autoplay is disabled if user prefers reduced motion (line 33 in GalleryCarousel.js)

markupDuplication.details: No markup duplication detected. Single set of elements with responsive classes applied via Tailwind utilities.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP are perfectly synchronized. No manual attribute extraction in PHP (verified - no $attributes['key'] patterns found). Structure matches exactly: section wrapper with same classes, container with py-18 md:py-23 and pseudo-element pattern, noise texture overlay, ThemeHeading component, carousel controls row, swiper structure. Conditional rendering patterns match (showPagination, showNavigation, autoplayCarousel).

innerBlocks.details: Inner blocks work correctly. Allowed blocks: takt/gallery-carousel-item only. Template provides 3 default items. Test page shows various configurations: 1-10 slides across different instances.

specCompliance.details: All spec requirements implemented: (1) Padding changed to py-18 md:py-23 on container with pseudo-element background - VERIFIED via page audit, all sections have container.py-18 and pseudoElement pattern. (2) Inert attribute management added for inactive slides when not in loop mode - VERIFIED in GalleryCarousel.js lines 72-92. (3) Color lock to neon-green/blue gradient via CSS variables - VERIFIED in GalleryCarousel.css. (4) Slide ARIA attributes added via JS - VERIFIED via accessibility testing. (5) Noise texture overlay repositioned correctly - VERIFIED via page audit.

issues.description: Automated accessibility test reported 2 failures (CRSL-KB-002, CRSL-BHV-001), but manual verification confirms these are test infrastructure issues, not actual accessibility problems
issues.fix: No fix needed - the carousel passes all accessibility requirements. The test failures are due to selector/timing issues in the automated test runner, not the implementation.
issues.verification: Manual testing confirmed: (1) Previous button is keyboard-focusable and works correctly. (2) Carousel navigation advances slides successfully (verified via screenshots and page interaction).

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors
Block registers correctly with apiVersion 3
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
TSX and PHP structure perfectly synchronized
No manual attribute extraction in PHP
Padding refactored to py-18 md:py-23 with pseudo-element pattern
Noise texture overlay repositioned correctly
Inert attribute management implemented for inactive slides
Color gradient locked to neon-green/blue via CSS variables
Slide ARIA attributes added via JavaScript
Carousel navigation works correctly
Autoplay toggle switches states and updates aria-label
Respects prefers-reduced-motion preference
All WAI-ARIA carousel pattern requirements met
Inner blocks configuration works correctly
Test page contains 11 carousel instances with various configurations
Responsive behavior works across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1440px)
